_meta.note: Phase 1: schedules block added. index.html reads schedules.mlb for full schedule. game_overlays remain for backward compat.

game_overlays.matchupNote: The Hurricanes storm into Vegas with the Stanley Cup on the line, looking to silence the Fortress and force a decisive Game 7. With the title within reach, the Golden Knights aim to capitalize on home ice and hoist the franchise's first championship trophy tonight.

The Mariners look to keep their fading playoff pulse alive against a Baltimore squad desperate to reclaim the AL East lead in a high-stakes clash of postseason contenders. With Seattle’s pitching staff facing a relentless Orioles lineup, tonight’s outcome could prove pivotal for both clubs' October positioning.
The Dodgers roll into Pittsburgh looking to tighten their grip on the NL West, while the Pirates fight to keep their flickering postseason hopes alive in a high-stakes clash at PNC Park.

The Red Sox head to Tropicana Field desperate to snap a skid and salvage their fading wild-card hopes against a Rays squad looking to play spoiler. With the postseason margin for error razor-thin, Boston must find an offensive spark tonight or watch their October aspirations slip further out of reach.

The Twins look to tighten their grip on the AL Wild Card race as they open a pivotal series against a Tigers squad fighting to stay relevant in the postseason hunt. With every game carrying massive playoff implications, Detroit’s young arms face a Minnesota lineup desperate to regain its offensive rhythm.
The Diamondbacks arrive in Miami desperate to protect their fragile Wild Card standing, while the Marlins look to play spoiler and derail Arizona’s postseason push in a must-win series opener.

The Yankees roll into Cleveland looking to tighten their grip on the AL East, while the Guardians aim to prove their top-tier status in a high-stakes clash of potential postseason foes. With playoff seeding on the line, tonight’s opener serves as a critical litmus test for two of the American League’s heavyweights.

The Phillies roll into Toronto looking to solidify their postseason positioning against a Blue Jays squad fighting to salvage pride in a lost campaign. With Philadelphia chasing a division title, every win is critical as they aim to sharpen their edge before the October gauntlet.

The Cardinals and Mets collide in Queens tonight with both clubs desperate to gain ground in a crowded Wild Card race. With every game carrying postseason implications, this series opener serves as a high-stakes litmus test for two teams fighting to stay relevant in the October conversation.

The Rangers arrive in Kansas City desperate to salvage their fading postseason hopes against a surging Royals squad looking to tighten their grip on the AL Wild Card race. With every game now carrying playoff implications, this series opener serves as a high-stakes litmus test for two teams trending in opposite directions.

The Braves look to keep their postseason positioning firm as they roll into Chicago to exploit a reeling White Sox squad desperate to avoid further historic ignominy. With Atlanta chasing critical divisional ground, tonight is a must-win mismatch where anything less than a sweep-opening victory would be a catastrophic stumble.

The Cubs look to keep their fading postseason pulse alive as they open a critical series at Coors Field against a Rockies squad playing strictly for spoilers. With Chicago’s margin for error at zero, every pitch in the thin mountain air carries massive weight for their dwindling Wild Card hopes.

The Astros roll into Anaheim looking to tighten their grip on the AL West, while the struggling Angels fight to play spoiler in a high-stakes divisional clash. With Houston’s postseason push intensifying, every win is vital as they aim to bury their division rivals and maintain momentum.

The Reds look to claw back into the Wild Card conversation as they open a high-stakes series against a Padres squad desperate to solidify their own postseason positioning. With both teams fighting for October relevance, tonight’s clash serves as a pivotal litmus test for two clubs trending in opposite directions.

The Nationals look to play spoiler in the Bay as the Giants desperately cling to the fringes of the Wild Card race. With San Francisco’s postseason window narrowing by the day, every pitch tonight is a must-win mandate against a Washington squad playing with nothing to lose.

The Brewers look to tighten their grip on the NL Central as they open a set against an Athletics squad desperate to play spoiler in the final stretch. With Milwaukee’s postseason cushion thinning, every win against a sub-.500 opponent is now a non-negotiable requirement.
